hooks.command: try { $d = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $dir = if ($d.cwd) { $d.cwd } elseif ($env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR) { $env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR } else { $PWD.Path }; if ($d.session_id) { Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $dir '.resume-session') -Value $d.session_id -NoNewline } } catch { }
